title: Asahikawa, Hokkaido — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Asahikawa, Hokkaido: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Asahikawa is a city in Hokkaido with a population of 340,000. Japan’s second-coldest major city, gateway to the Daisetsuzan National Park and home to the Asahiyama Zoo.

Last updated: July 19, 2026
